title.en: China-to-Guinea Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入几内亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入幾內亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Guinea national conformity, EDG grid-connection and project-owner requirements, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 interconnection, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 220/380 V settings, and humid coastal / Harmattan dust operating conditions — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与几内亚国家合格评定、EDG并网及项目业主要求、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727互联、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 220/380 V参数以及潮湿沿海/哈马丹尘土运行环境——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與幾內亞國家合格評定、EDG併網及項目業主要求、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727互聯、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 220/380 V參數以及潮濕沿海/哈馬丹塵土運行環境——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IGNM conformity scope determination, ARSEE-Guinea regulatory licence determination, EDG grid-connection approval, customs determination, donor/lender acceptance, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, EPC contractors, and installers should verify current Guinea standards-body requirements, electricity-sector licensing rules, EDG connection conditions, project-owner specifications, donor/lender clauses, customs requirements, and environmental derating assumptions with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IGNM合格评定范围裁定、几内亚电力监管许可裁定、EDG并网批准、海关裁定、捐助方/贷款方接受结论或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、EPC承包商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行几内亚标准机构要求、电力行业许可规则、EDG接入条件、项目业主规格、捐助方/贷款方条款、海关要求及环境降额假设。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IGNM合格評定範圍裁定、幾內亞電力監管許可裁定、EDG併網批准、海關裁定、捐助方/貸款方接受結論或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、EPC承包商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行幾內亞標準機構要求、電力行業許可規則、EDG接入條件、項目業主規格、捐助方/貸款方條款、海關要求及環境降額假設。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Guinea, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming the applicable Guinea national conformity route through IGNM or the competent ministry, because a public inverter-specific compulsory list could not be confirmed; (2) obtaining EDG and project-owner acceptance for grid-tied plants, including 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V settings and protection coordination; (3) preparing IEC 62109-1/-2 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 interconnection, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC and harmonic evidence where donor, lender, EPC, or utility specifications require IEC documentation; and (4) validating tropical humidity, corrosion, dust, and Harmattan derating assumptions for Conakry and inland sites. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines do not automatically satisfy Guinea national conformity, EDG connection, or donor/lender acceptance without supplementary IEC and project-specific evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口几内亚时，主要实际差距包括：（1）通过IGNM或主管部委确认适用的几内亚国家合格评定路径，因为未能确认公开的逆变器专门强制清单；（2）针对并网电站取得EDG及项目业主接受，包括50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数和保护配合；（3）在捐助方、贷款方、EPC或公用事业规格要求IEC文件时，准备IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727互联、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC及谐波证据；（4）针对科纳克里及内陆站点验证热带湿度、腐蚀、粉尘和哈马丹降额假设。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准不能在没有补充IEC和项目特定证据的情况下自动满足几内亚国家合格评定、EDG接入或捐助方/贷款方接受要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口幾內亞時，主要實際差距包括：（1）通過IGNM或主管部委確認適用的幾內亞國家合格評定路徑，因為未能確認公開的逆變器專門強制清單；（2）針對併網電站取得EDG及項目業主接受，包括50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數和保護配合；（3）在捐助方、貸款方、EPC或公用事業規格要求IEC文件時，準備IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727互聯、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC及諧波證據；（4）針對科納克里及內陸站點驗證熱帶濕度、腐蝕、粉塵和哈馬丹降額假設。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準不能在沒有補充IEC和項目特定證據的情況下自動滿足幾內亞國家合格評定、EDG接入或捐助方/貸款方接受要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
